case_title: ESTRELLA MENDOZA VS. CENTRAL CITY HOSPITALITY HOUSE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ESTRELLA MENDOZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CENTRAL CITY HOSPITALITY HOUSE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MENDOZA, ESTRELLA AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CITY HOSPITALITY HOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, ESTRELLA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00 <WAIVED>) SERVED OCT-04-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CITY HOSPITALITY HOUSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, ESTRELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTRAL CITY HOSPITALITY HOUSE $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CITY HOSPITALITY HOUSE
